prompt: I'm building a drag-and-drop roster management feature for my dynasty fantasy app. Users can drag players from a 'Available Players' list and drop them into one of their roster slots. How do I make this fully accessible? I need it to work for keyboard-only users and screen reader users who can't use a mouse.

assertions.text: Covers a keyboard alternative interaction (pick up / move / drop / cancel)
Mentions Space or Enter to pick up and drop, arrow keys to move
Mentions Escape to cancel a drag operation
Flags that aria-grabbed is deprecated and should not be used
Covers live region announcements for drag state (picked up, moved to, dropped)
Mentions visible indication of the 'grabbed' / active drag state
Mentions providing instructions to users on how to use the keyboard interface
